title: Premium Mealworms Wild Bird Food, Protein Food for All Species, Natural High Energy Feed, No Mess Bird Food for All Birds (1L Tub, Mealworms)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 🪶 High-Energy Bird Feed – A nutrient-rich, protein-packed mix ideal for year-round feeding. Our premium dried mealworms for birds are perfect for robins, tits, blackbirds, and other garden birds—providing high-energy wild bird food they love daily.

🌼 Sealed for Freshness – This 1L tub of dried mealworms for birds is sealed airtight to preserve freshness, protein content, and taste birds love. A perfect high-protein wild bird treat for garden feeders, all year round.

🌞 All Birds Welcome – Our wild bird food selection includes dried mealworms, berry mix suets, sunflower hearts, black sunflower seeds, calci worms, niger seeds, peanuts, fat balls, and more—formulated to attract a colorful variety of garden birds to your outdoor space.

📦 Value-Packed 1L Tub – Our bulk dried mealworms for birds offer fewer refills and a longer-lasting supply of high-protein wild bird food. Ideal for feeders, tables, and ground spots—easy, mess-free feeding for garden birds year-round.
💬 Customer Satisfaction First – At Direct Deals 123, we’re proud to offer top-quality bird food that keeps both your garden birds and you happy. Your satisfaction is always our priority.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎High Protein Content, Natural Energy Source, Packed with Micronutrients, Rich in Healthy Fats, Safe & Hygienic
